mapper.select:
SELECT flow_no AS flowNo, payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, flow_type AS flowType, flow_type_tag AS flowTypeTag, channel_code AS channelCode, terminal, client_ip AS clientIp, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, business_status AS businessStatus, business_status_type AS businessStatusType, notify_type AS notifyType, route_rule AS routeRule, downstream_system AS downstreamSystem, event_topic AS eventTopic, publish_status AS publishStatus, retry_count AS retryCount, request_payload AS requestPayload, response_payload AS responsePayload, summary, created_at AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT attempt_no AS flow_no, pa.payment_order_id, po.order_no, pa.prepay_order_no, '支付尝试' AS flow_type, 'info' AS flow_type_tag, pa.channel_code, pa.terminal, pa.client_ip, pa.idempotency_key, pa.attempt_status AS business_status, pa.attempt_status_type AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, pa.request_payload, pa.response_payload, CONCAT('方式=', pa.payment_method, ' / 请求=', pa.request_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pa.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT notify_no AS flow_no, pnl.payment_order_id, po.order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '渠道回调' AS flow_type, 'warn' AS flow_type_tag, pnl.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, pnl.notify_status AS business_status, pnl.notify_status_type AS business_status_type, pnl.notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, pnl.notify_payload AS request_payload, pnl.notify_result AS response_payload, CONCAT('类型=', pnl.notify_type, ' / 报文=', pnl.notify_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pnl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UNION ALL
SELECT route_no AS flow_no, prr.payment_order_id, po.order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '路由记录' AS flow_type, 'info' AS flow_type_tag, prr.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, prr.route_result AS business_status, 'info' AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, prr.route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, NULL AS request_payload, NULL AS response_payload, CONCAT('规则=', prr.route_rule, ' / 结果=', prr.route_result) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(prr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_route_record prr LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UNION ALL
SELECT event_no AS flow_no, pe.payment_order_id, pe.biz_no AS order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '业务事件' AS flow_type, 'success' AS flow_type_tag, po.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, pe.event_type AS business_status, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' THEN 'success' WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'danger' ELSE 'info' END AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, pe.downstream_system, pe.event_topic, pe.publish_status, pe.retry_count, pe.event_payload AS request_payload, NULL AS response_payload, CONCAT('事件=', pe.event_type, ' / 载荷=', pe.event_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pe.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_event pe LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pe.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = pe.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) payment_flow_union
payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND flow_type = #{query.flowType}
AND channel_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.channelCode}, '%')
AND terminal = #{query.terminal}
AND business_status = #{query.businessStatus}
AND ( summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR request_payload LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR response_payload LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY retry_count
ORDER BY flow_type
ORDER BY created_at
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT attempt_no AS flow_no, pa.payment_order_id, po.order_no, pa.prepay_order_no, '支付尝试' AS flow_type, 'info' AS flow_type_tag, pa.channel_code, pa.terminal, pa.client_ip, pa.idempotency_key, pa.attempt_status AS business_status, pa.attempt_status_type AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, pa.request_payload, pa.response_payload, CONCAT('方式=', pa.payment_method, ' / 请求=', pa.request_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pa.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT notify_no AS flow_no, pnl.payment_order_id, po.order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '渠道回调' AS flow_type, 'warn' AS flow_type_tag, pnl.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, pnl.notify_status AS business_status, pnl.notify_status_type AS business_status_type, pnl.notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, pnl.notify_payload AS request_payload, pnl.notify_result AS response_payload, CONCAT('类型=', pnl.notify_type, ' / 报文=', pnl.notify_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pnl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UNION ALL
SELECT route_no AS flow_no, prr.payment_order_id, po.order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '路由记录' AS flow_type, 'info' AS flow_type_tag, prr.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, prr.route_result AS business_status, 'info' AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, prr.route_rule, NULL AS downstream_system, NULL AS event_topic, NULL AS publish_status, NULL AS retry_count, NULL AS request_payload, NULL AS response_payload, CONCAT('规则=', prr.route_rule, ' / 结果=', prr.route_result) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(prr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_route_record prr LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UNION ALL
SELECT event_no AS flow_no, pe.payment_order_id, pe.biz_no AS order_no, latest_pr.prepay_order_no, '业务事件' AS flow_type, 'success' AS flow_type_tag, po.channel_code, NULL AS terminal, NULL AS client_ip, NULL AS idempotency_key, pe.event_type AS business_status, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' THEN 'success' WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'danger' ELSE 'info' END AS business_status_type, NULL AS notify_type, NULL AS route_rule, pe.downstream_system, pe.event_topic, pe.publish_status, pe.retry_count, pe.event_payload AS request_payload, NULL AS response_payload, CONCAT('事件=', pe.event_type, ' / 载荷=', pe.event_payload) AS summary, DATE_FORMAT(pe.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_event pe LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pe.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = pe.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) payment_flow_union
payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND flow_type = #{query.flowType}
AND channel_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.channelCode}, '%')
AND terminal = #{query.terminal}
AND business_status = #{query.businessStatus}
AND ( summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR request_payload LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR response_payload LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
